exec.arg: echo "=== Detecting changed log files ===" CHANGED_FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD -- 'logs/*.json' || true) if [ -z "$CHANGED_FILES" ]; then echo "No changed log files detected" echo "" > changed_files.txt else echo "$CHANGED_FILES" > changed_files.txt echo "Changed files:" cat changed_files.txt fi

CHANGED_FILES=$(cat metadata/changed_files.txt) if [ -z "$CHANGED_FILES" ]; then echo "No files to validate, skipping" exit 0 fi echo "=== Validating JSON log files ===" for file in $CHANGED_FILES; do if [ ! -f "$file" ]; then echo "ERROR: File not found: $file" exit 1 fi python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('$file'))" || exit 1 echo "Validated: $file" done

CHANGED_FILES=$(cat metadata/changed_files.txt) if [ -z "$CHANGED_FILES" ]; then echo "No files to analyze, skipping" exit 0 fi TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S") for LOG_FILE in $CHANGED_FILES; do echo "=== Error analysis on $LOG_FILE ===" export LOG_FILE TIMESTAMP python3 << 'PYEOF' import json, os, time from urllib.request import Request, urlopen from urllib.error import HTTPError, URLError
api_key = os.environ.get("DEVIN_API_KEY") log_file = os.environ.get("LOG_FILE", "") timestamp = os.environ.get("TIMESTAMP", "")
prompt = f"@elastic_logs Read {log_file}. Count all entries with level='ERROR'. Group by: status_code, service_name, error_message. List top 10 most frequent errors. Save as error_report_{timestamp}.html in analysis/"
payload = {"prompt": prompt} data = json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8') request = Request( os.environ["DEVIN_API_URL"], data=data, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {api_key}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST" )
max_retries = 3 for attempt in range(max_retries): try: with urlopen(request, timeout=60) as response: result = json.loads(response.read().decode('utf-8')) print(f" error: {result['url']}") break except (HTTPError, URLError) as e: if attempt < max_retries - 1: print(f" Retry {attempt + 1}/{max_retries}: {e}") time.sleep(2 ** attempt) else: raise PYEOF done

CHANGED_FILES=$(cat metadata/changed_files.txt) if [ -z "$CHANGED_FILES" ]; then echo "No files to analyze, skipping" exit 0 fi TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S") for LOG_FILE in $CHANGED_FILES; do echo "=== Performance analysis on $LOG_FILE ===" export LOG_FILE TIMESTAMP python3 << 'PYEOF' import json, os, time from urllib.request import Request, urlopen from urllib.error import HTTPError, URLError
api_key = os.environ.get("DEVIN_API_KEY") log_file = os.environ.get("LOG_FILE", "") timestamp = os.environ.get("TIMESTAMP", "")
prompt = f"@elastic_logs Read {log_file}. Calculate response_time stats: min, max, avg, p95, p99. List slowest 10 endpoints. Identify any response_time > 1000ms. Save as performance_report_{timestamp}.html in analysis/"
payload = {"prompt": prompt} data = json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8') request = Request( os.environ["DEVIN_API_URL"], data=data, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {api_key}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST" )
max_retries = 3 for attempt in range(max_retries): try: with urlopen(request, timeout=60) as response: result = json.loads(response.read().decode('utf-8')) print(f" performance: {result['url']}") break except (HTTPError, URLError) as e: if attempt < max_retries - 1: print(f" Retry {attempt + 1}/{max_retries}: {e}") time.sleep(2 ** attempt) else: raise PYEOF done

CHANGED_FILES=$(cat metadata/changed_files.txt) if [ -z "$CHANGED_FILES" ]; then echo "No files to analyze, skipping" exit 0 fi TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S") for LOG_FILE in $CHANGED_FILES; do echo "=== Security analysis on $LOG_FILE ===" export LOG_FILE TIMESTAMP python3 << 'PYEOF' import json, os, time from urllib.request import Request, urlopen from urllib.error import HTTPError, URLError
api_key = os.environ.get("DEVIN_API_KEY") log_file = os.environ.get("LOG_FILE", "") timestamp = os.environ.get("TIMESTAMP", "")
prompt = f"@elastic_logs Read {log_file}. Find: status_code=401/403 entries, unique IPs with >10 failed requests, any SQL/XSS patterns in request_path. Save as security_report_{timestamp}.html in analysis/"
payload = {"prompt": prompt} data = json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8') request = Request( os.environ["DEVIN_API_URL"], data=data, headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {api_key}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST" )
max_retries = 3 for attempt in range(max_retries): try: with urlopen(request, timeout=60) as response: result = json.loads(response.read().decode('utf-8')) print(f" security: {result['url']}") break except (HTTPError, URLError) as e: if attempt < max_retries - 1: print(f" Retry {attempt + 1}/{max_retries}: {e}") time.sleep(2 ** attempt) else: raise PYEOF done

echo "=== Detecting changed log files ===" CHANGED_FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD -- 'logs/*.json' || true) if [ -z "$CHANGED_FILES" ]; then echo "No changed log files detected" echo "" > changed_files.txt else echo "$CHANGED_FILES" > changed_files.txt echo "Changed files:" cat changed_files.txt fi

CHANGED_FILES=$(cat metadata/changed_files.txt) if [ -z "$CHANGED_FILES" ]; then echo "No files to process, skipping" exit 0 fi for LOG_FILE in $CHANGED_FILES; do echo "=== Processing $LOG_FILE with playbook ===" export LOG_FILE python3 << 'PYEOF' import json, os from urllib.request import Request, urlopen
api_key = os.environ.get("DEVIN_API_KEY") log_file = os.environ.get("LOG_FILE", "")
payload = { "prompt": f"@elastic_logs Run playbook !logs_analysis on {log_file}. Follow coding guidelines !coding-guidelines. Save all HTML reports to analysis/ folder." }
data = json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8') request = Request( os.environ["DEVIN_API_URL"], data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {api_key}", "Content-Type": "application/json", }, method="POST" )
with urlopen(request, timeout=30) as response: result = json.loads(response.read().decode('utf-8')) print(f" Playbook session: {result['url']}") PYEOF done
